title: A 1-km surface air temperature reconstruction reveals terrain-driven thermal heterogeneity and ecosystem responses across Arctic land
description: Code for the machine-learning-based 1-km monthly surface air temperature (SAT) reconstruction over Arctic land (north of 60N, 2000-2022) and the downstream analyses linking SAT with snow-cover end date (SCE), gross primary productivity (GPP), and elevation. Accompanies the Nature Communications manuscript.

creators.name: Lee, Seoyeon
creators.affiliation: Korea Institute of Science and Technology (KIST)
